description: ICE statement card on a dark navy wood-grain-textured background. The top-left has the DHS seal beside gray text 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' A thin horizontal red rule separates the header from the body. Centered below in a white serif heading is the word 'STATEMENT,' followed by centered white serif body text: 'ICE extends sincere condolences to the loved ones of those killed during the midair collision near Reagan National Airport in our nation's capital. We wish strength to all those involved in the recovery mission.'
notable_text: STATEMENT; ICE extends sincere condolences ... midair collision near Reagan National Airport
